product: Databricks Documentation site table of contents tabs
tagline: The Databricks Documentation site now provides a tabbed experience for easier navigation and discoverability of documentation pages.
what_it_does: The Databricks Documentation site now provides a tabbed experience for easier navigation and discoverability of documentation pages. Click the links in the documentation site header to switch between information contexts: usage guides, getting started, developer tools and partners, reference, resources, and release notes.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: The Databricks Documentation site now provides a tabbed experience for easier navigation and discoverability of documentation pages.
